name: agent-project-bootstrap
postCreateCommand: pip install pre-commit && cd examples/python && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && uv sync --all-extras && cd ../web && npm install
postStartCommand: bash scripts/check-file-encoding.sh || true; bash scripts/check-template-updates.sh || true; echo 'Tip: pick Cursor mode via docs/CURSOR_MODES.md before editing'; echo 'Tip: after push to main, run scripts/check-github-ci.sh --wait 300'
